/CAL:STATUS OF TREATMENT PROGRAM/X:COUNSEL INFORMS THE COURT THAT THE DEFENDANT HAS ABSCONDED FROM THE HARBOR LIGHTS TREATMENT PROGRAM/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL:25,000/BWNUM:2ND/X: 2 OF 3 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/
/CAL: RTP PROGRESS REPORT/X: NOT REPORTED/DEF: APPEARANCE IS WAIVED IF THE DEFENDANT RECEIVED A POSITIVE REPORT/CONTD:RTP PROGRESS REPORT 06-30-21DEPT 15/

/CAL:CLARIFY COURT ORDERS FROM 06-21-21/X:THIS IS AN AMENDED MINUTE AS OF07-29-21/X:THE COURT IS REVISING SOME RELEASE CONDITIONS SET FORTH ON 06-21-21 AS FOLLOWS:/OR/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH STAFF MEMBER FROM HARBOR LIGHTS IS IN PLACE FOR TRANSPORT TOSAID PROGRAM ,/CTORD: THE FOLLOWING TERMS AND CONDITIONS SHALL ALSO APPLY:/X:(1)HARBOR LIGHTS DETOX PROGRAM FOR A MINIMUM OF 30 DAYS; (2) MAY PARTICIPATE IN TREATMENT OR COUNSELING OFFSITE AS APPROVED BY THE PROGRAM; (3) AFTER DETOX  TO BE DETERMINED BY HARBOR LIGHTS STAFF,  DEFENDANT MUST REPORTTO NOVA SOBER LIVING PROGRAM FOR UP TO 2 WEEK BLACKOUT PERIOD/CTORD:THE ELECTRONINC MONITORING REQUIREMENT IS HEREBY TERMINATED/WEAP/RX/POSS:BURGLARY TOOLS/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL NOT CONSUME ANY ALCOHOL OR MARIJUANA/DEF:SHALL ABIDE BY ALL STAY AWAY ORDERS CURRENTLY IN PLACE AS SET FORTH FURTHERON THE RECORD/ /X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM PROGRESS REPORT (ON 6-29,7-6, 7-13 & 7-20)/DOPU:FAVORBALE REPORT/

/CAL:MOTION TO RELEASE OR BAIL REDUCTION/X:REFERRED FROM DEPARTMENT 22/ARG&SUB/MO GRTD/OR/LD:08-09-21/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANTSHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALLBE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BERELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/CTORD: THE FOLLOWING TERMS AND CONDITIONS SHALL ALSO APPLY:/X:(1)HARBOR LIGHTS DETOX PROGRAM FOR A MINIMUM OF 30 DAYS; (2) MAY PARTICIPATE IN TREATMENT OR COUNSELING OFFSITE AS APPROVED BY THE PROGRAM; (3) AFTER DETOX MUST REPORT TO NOVA SOBER LIVING PROGRAM FOR UP TO 2 WEEK BLACKOUTPERIOD; (4) AFTER SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF NOVA, MAY PETITION THE COURT TO TERMINATEEM/WEAP/POSS:BURGLARY TOOLS/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL NOT SONSUME ANY ALCOHOLOR MARIJUANA/DEF: SHALL ABIDE BY ALL STAY AWAY ORDERS CURRENTLY IN PLACEAS SET FORTH FURTHER ON THE RECORD/ /X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:FUTUREDATE IS CONFIRMED/
